div.h1: Archetype Concept: Memory Layout & Component Signatures

div.p: Each Archetype functions as a unique table where every row has the exact same component set.

ol.li: Zero Indirection: Components are adjacent in memory; no pointer chasing.
SIMD Optimization: Systems process Archetype B with SIMD (AVX/SSE) without branching.
Query Filtering: Query<Pos, Vel> identifies Archetype B and C, skipping A.
